glosses.vi: của chúng tôi; của chúng ta

sentences.target: J'ai nos billets pour le concert.

translations.fr: J'ai nos billets pour le concert.
translations.en: I have our tickets for the concert.
translations.es: Tengo nuestras entradas para el concierto.
translations.de: Ich habe unsere Karten für das Konzert.
translations.it: Ho i nostri biglietti per il concerto.
translations.ko: 우리 콘서트 표는 내가 가지고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我有我们的演唱会门票。
translations.yue: 我有我哋嘅音樂會門票。
translations.ru: У меня есть наши билеты на концерт.
translations.pt: Tenho os nossos bilhetes para o concerto.
translations.he: יש לי את הכרטיסים שלנו להופעה.
translations.vi: Tôi có vé buổi hòa nhạc của chúng ta.
translations.nl: Ik heb onze kaartjes voor het concert.
translations.uk: У мене є наші квитки на концерт.
translations.hu: Nálam vannak a koncertre szóló jegyeink.
translations.hi: हमारे कंसर्ट के टिकट मेरे पास हैं.
translations.el: Έχω τα εισιτήριά μας για τη συναυλία.
translations.nb: Jeg har billettene våre til konserten.
translations.sv: Jag har våra biljetter till konserten.
translations.da: Jeg har vores billetter til koncerten.
translations.ja: 私たちのチケットは私が持っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject clitic pronoun, elided before a vowel-initial verb; subject of the verb.
Present indicative, 1st person singular of 'avoir'; here used as a main verb meaning 'have'.
1st person plural possessive determiner; agrees in number with the following noun.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'ai'.
Preposition introducing a purpose/beneficiary complement.
Definite article, masculine singular; determines 'concert'.
Common noun, masculine singular; complement of the preposition 'pour'.

sentences.target: Tu prends nos sacs, s'il te plaît.
sentences.reading: /ty pʁɑ̃ no sak sil tə plɛ/

translations.fr: Tu prends nos sacs, s'il te plaît.
translations.ipa: /ty pʁɑ̃ no sak sil tə plɛ/
translations.it: Per favore, prendi le nostre borse.
translations.pt: Por favor, leva as nossas mochilas.
translations.vi: Làm ơn lấy túi của chúng ta.
translations.nb: Vær så snill, ta sekkene våre.
translations.ja: 私たちのバッグを持っていってください。

tokens.explanation: 2nd person singular subject pronoun; subject of 'prends'.
Present indicative, 2nd person singular of 'prendre'; main verb.
1st person plural possessive determiner; modifies 'sacs'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'prends'.
Subordinating conjunction 'si' elided before 'il' in the fixed polite expression.
3rd person singular subject pronoun; impersonal subject in the formula 's'il te plaît'.
2nd person singular unstressed object clitic; indirect object of 'plaît'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular of 'plaire'; part of the idiomatic polite expression meaning 'please'.

sentences.target: On retrouve nos amis au café.

translations.fr: On retrouve nos amis au café.
translations.en: We're meeting our friends at the café.
translations.es: Quedamos con nuestros amigos en el café.
translations.de: Wir treffen unsere Freunde im Café.
translations.it: Ci incontriamo con i nostri amici al caffè.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在咖啡馆和朋友见面。
translations.yue: 我哋喺咖啡店同朋友見面。
translations.ru: Мы встречаемся с друзьями в кафе.
translations.pt: Vamos encontrar os nossos amigos no café.
translations.he: אנחנו נפגשים עם החברים שלנו בבית הקפה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta gặp bạn bè ở quán cà phê.
translations.nl: We ontmoeten onze vrienden in het café.
translations.uk: Ми зустрічаємося з нашими друзями в кав'ярні.
translations.hi: हम कैफ़े में अपने दोस्तों से मिल रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Spotykamy się z naszymi przyjaciółmi в kawiarni.
translations.el: Συναντάμε τους φίλους μας στο καφέ.
translations.nb: Vi møter vennene våre på kafe.
translations.id: Kita bertemu teman-teman kita di kafe.
translations.sv: Vi träffar våra vänner på kaféet.
translations.ro: Ne întâlnim cu prietenii noștri la cafenea.
translations.cs: Scházíme se s našimi přáteli v kavárně.
translations.da: Vi mødes med vores venner på caféen.
translations.ja: 私たちはカフェで友だちと会います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite personal pronoun often used colloquially for 'we'; subject of 'retrouve'.
Present indicative, 3rd person singular (agreeing with 'on') of 'retrouver'; main verb.
1st person plural possessive determiner; modifies 'amis'.
Common noun, masculine plural; direct object of 'retrouve'.
Preposition 'à' contracted with the definite article 'le' (à + le); introduces the locative complement.
Common noun, masculine singular; object of the preposition 'au'.

sentences.target: Nous rangeons nos chaussures dans l'entrée.

translations.fr: Nous rangeons nos chaussures dans l'entrée.
translations.en: We put away our shoes in the entryway.
translations.es: Guardamos nuestros zapatos en la entrada.
translations.de: Wir räumen unsere Schuhe im Flur weg.
translations.it: Mettiamo via le nostre scarpe all’ingresso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们把鞋子收好在玄关里。
translations.yue: 我哋喺門口擺好我哋嘅鞋。
translations.ru: Мы убираем нашу обувь в прихожей.
translations.pt: Guardamos os nossos sapatos na entrada.
translations.he: אנחנו מסדרים את הנעליים שלנו בכניסה.
translations.vi: Chúng ta cất giày dép ở lối vào.
translations.nl: We zetten onze schoenen netjes in de hal.
translations.uk: Ми прибираємо наше взуття в передпокої.
translations.hi: हम प्रवेशद्वार में अपने जूते व्यवस्थित करते हैं.
translations.el: Τακτοποιούμε τα παπούτσια μας στην είσοδο.
translations.nb: Vi setter skoene våre på plass i gangen.
translations.id: Kami merapikan sepatu kami di pintu masuk.
translations.sv: Vi ställer undan våra skor i hallen.
translations.ro: Punem la loc pantofii noștri în hol.
translations.da: Vi lægger vores sko på plads i entréen.
translations.ja: 私たちは玄関で靴を片づけます。

tokens.explanation: 1st person plural subject pronoun; subject of 'rangeons'.
Present indicative, 1st person plural of 'ranger'; main verb.
1st person plural possessive determiner; modifies 'chaussures'.
Common noun, feminine plural; direct object of 'rangeons'.
Preposition introducing a location complement.
Definite article elided before a vowel-initial noun; agrees with feminine 'entrée'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'dans'.
